components.name: Alert Module
components.description: Generates a sensory alert, such as a haptic vibration, audible tone, or visual indicator, in response to a signal from the processing unit.

components.name: Posture Sensor Array
components.description: Detects the distribution of a user's weight and position within the chair to generate raw posture data.

components.name: Power Supply
components.description: Provides electrical power to the electronic components of the system, such as the sensors, processing unit, and alert module.

components.name: Processing Unit
components.description: Receives and analyzes raw sensor data to classify the user's posture and track its duration against a predetermined threshold.
